reviews.review_title: I wish this was popular again
reviews.review_description: This was one of my favorite gorilla tag fan games because of its simple lobby and it’s fun atmosphere. If someone is seeing this, please revive this game. ￼you can go ahead and install it and try it for yourself. It’s really fun.

reviews.review_title: this is one of my favorite games
reviews.review_description: I play this game every day, it's really great fun, highly recommended. I think it's a shame that there are so few people online in this game because it's such a good game, more people should come, so DOWNLOAD THIS GAME and maybe you'll see me (=
